text: Computer vision is a field of artificial intelligence that enables computers to understand and interpret visual information from the world. Two key tasks are image recognition, where a computer identifies what an image shows, such as a cat or a tree, and object detection, which locates specific items within a picture. These technologies have many practical applications. For example, security cameras use them to spot suspicious activity. Most impressively, self-driving cars rely heavily on computer vision to recognise road signs, pedestrians, and other vehicles, helping them navigate safely without human input. This makes computer vision essential for modern automation and safety.
